## What this changes

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and `npm run coverage` if you touched `src/lib/**`)
- [ ] Formatting applied (`npm run format`, or the pre-commit hook handled it)
- [ ] Docs / translations updated if needed (adding an i18n key requires a value in all 10 locales)
